<<The first approach>> <<involves using>> <<a recursive function>> <<that checks>> <<each element>> <<within the tuple>> <<and adds>> <<the value>> <<if it is numeric>>. <<Non-numeric elements>> <<are ignored>> <<and the function>> <<continues to recurse>> <<through nested tuples>> <<until all elements>> <<are processed>>. <<This method>> <<ensures that all numeric values>> <<are captured>> <<regardless of their position>> <<within the nested structure>>. <<The function>> <<must also handle>> <<mixed data types>> <<and only sum>> <<the numeric ones>>.
